description: VBX-ISPS Decision Classification Policy v0.1. This file is cryptographically committed alongside the substrate prototype. Reclassification of any decision class out of REQUIRES_HUMAN constitutes a versioned policy update and requires re-commit to chain (HF-9).

log_only.description: Log the event and continue. No actuation.

isolate_sensor_use_redundant.description: Mark sensor as faulted on chain; fail over to redundant sensor; alert crew within 30s.

thermal_passive_hold.description: Hold thermal control at last-known-safe state; alert crew advisory.

battery_conserve_hold.description: Engage minimum-power profile; alert crew advisory.

scrubber_status_quo_with_alert.description: Continue current scrubber configuration; alert crew within 60s.

kernel_locked_actuation.description: Delegate to Mercury deterministic kernel; gate cannot reroute.

reclassification_rule: Any modification to the 'level' field of any decision class requires (1) a new policy file version, (2) re-commit of the new policy file hash to the chain, (3) explicit human authorization entry on chain prior to the new policy taking effect.
